---
title: "Q9 — Find variance from P(Xbar <= 58.2)"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Q9
n <- 25; xbar_obs <- 58.2; mu <- 60; p_obs <- 0.0668
z <- qnorm(p_obs)
sigma_est <- (xbar_obs - mu) * sqrt(n) / z
var_est <- sigma_est^2
z; sigma_est; var_est
```
